title: Pulse Meter Bidirectional
description: This bidirectional meter is suitable for recording consumption and delivery of various utilities such as electricity, gas, water, heat, etc.

inputs.description: For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs.
For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs.
For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs used as frequency counter.
For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs used as frequency counter.
Pulse: Meter reading outputs are reset. On: Block is locked.

outputs.description: Current power/flow calculated using inputs (Pc) and (Fc) is output as a positive value. Current power/flow calculated using inputs (Pd) and (Fd) is output as a negative value.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

properties.description: If checked, you will be notified if invalid Meter Reading values have been detected. For instance, when a physical counter sends unrealistic values due to transmission errors.
